rows.label: tlk70000020_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Did you know that this
splendid garden was made
for the first king of Iira?

rows.label: tlk70000020_01_msg0002
rows.name:
The placement of the stones and
patterns in the sand are meant to
reflect the natural world around us.

rows.label: tlk70000020_01_msg0003
rows.name:
But do you know for what purpose
the garden was made, and why this
location in particular was chosen?

rows.label: tlk70000020_01_msg0004
rows.name:
The intention was that seeing this
garden would keep the viewer from
losing their grounding in nature.

rows.label: tlk70000020_01_msg0005
rows.name:
The first Iiran king is said
to have taught that, and the
current king keeps it.

rows.label: tlk70000020_01_msg0006
rows.name:
It is so like Iira's king, who
cherishes the Divine Beast. A
wonderful endeavor, isn't it?
